name: openseadragon

en.when_to_use: Use it to browse huge/ultra-high-resolution images pixel-deep in a small viewport with progressive levels (scanned rare books, maps, pathology/astronomy imagery, art) when the source is a DZI/IIIF tile pyramid or one large image. Use photoswipe from the catalog for an ordinary gallery/lightbox, or @panzoom/panzoom for lightweight pan/zoom on one element. Inside shadow, always pass element rather than id.
en.why_valuable: A gigapixel tiled pyramid with progressive loading, multiple LODs, and inertial panning down to pixel level is far beyond the fixed AI can produce natively; hand-writing tile scheduling is nearly impossible.

data_in.note: OpenSeadragon(options) is a factory function (default export). Inside shadow, pass element (the node), not id (a string that calls document.getElementById and fails). boot points prefixUrl to the CDN icons; it is not consumer input.

schema.tileSources: string | object | Array -- DZI (.dzi URL) | IIIF info.json | { type:'image', url } single ordinary image | array (with sequenceMode for paging)
schema.showNavigator?: boolean -- thumbnail navigator in the upper right, default true in this entry
schema.sequenceMode?: boolean -- multi-image paging mode, default false

spec.note: The deep-zoom viewer draws from the container size and needs a fixed pixel height; boot sets el.style.height and :host expands to it. vh/percentage height is prohibited.

when_to_use: 要在小视口里对超大/超高清图逐级像素级深缩浏览(扫描古籍、地图、病理/天文影像、艺术品),图源是 DZI/IIIF tile pyramid 或单张大图时用它。普通图集/lightbox 用目录里的 photoswipe;只要轻量 pan/zoom 单元素用 @panzoom/panzoom。shadow 内务必传 element 而非 id。
why_valuable: gigapixel 分块金字塔(tiled pyramid)渐进加载 + 多级 LOD + 惯性平移缩到像素级,原生 AI 只能 塞一张固定图;手写 tile 调度几乎不可能。

data_in.note: OpenSeadragon(options) 是工厂函数(default export)。shadow 内必须传 element(节点)而非 id(字符串,会走 document.getElementById 失败);prefixUrl 由 boot 指向 CDN 图标,非消费者输入。

schema.tileSources: string | object | Array —— DZI(.dzi URL)| IIIF info.json | { type:'image', url } 单张普通图 | 数组(配 sequenceMode 翻页)
schema.showNavigator?: boolean —— 右上角缩略导航图,本条默认 true
schema.sequenceMode?: boolean —— 多图翻页模式,默认 false
schema.crossOriginPolicy?: 'Anonymous' | 'use-credentials' | false —— 跨域取图策略,默认 'Anonymous'

spec.note: 深缩 viewer 读容器尺寸绘制,需固定像素高;boot 内 el.style.height 已设,:host 撑高、禁 vh/百分比高。

uplink: 视口/缩放/翻页状态若需外传,由消费 AI 接 viewer.addHandler('zoom'|'pan'|'page') 原生事件并按载体处理,本条不预设事件契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:传 element 而非 id、prefixUrl 指向 CDN 图标;核心 viewer 在容器内,唯 fullscreen 会逃出 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + canvas + prefixUrl 图标,无 worker 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm default export 为 OpenSeadragon 工厂(grep: 'Fe as default');OpenSeadragon({element|id, prefixUrl, tileSources, showNavigator, sequenceMode, crossOriginPolicy}) 见 types/index.d.ts 的 interface Options。viewer + navigator + 控制按钮渲染在传入 element 内;按钮 sprite 从 prefixUrl 加载(build/openseadragon/images/*.png 已确认存在)。globalDomMutation=yes:+esm grep document.body=20、document.head=2——fullscreen/measurement 路径向 body 追加(fullscreen 逃逸 shadow,核心 viewer 不逃)。globalEvents=yes:MouseTracker 拖拽期加 document 级 move/up 监听(结束移除)。SHADOW GOTCHA:getElement() 对 id 字符串走 document.getElementById,在 shadow root 内取不到,故必须传 element(节点)而非 id。shadowCompatible=conditional:核心 pan/zoom viewer 经 element+prefixUrl 在 shadow 内可用,仅可选 fullscreen 覆盖层离开 shadow 树。
